query:
-- Look at ChannelHaus services that have correct margins (cost != revenue, both > 0)
-- to understand the pattern of how revenue was set for working services
SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyRevenue, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost != s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY marginPct DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Look at ChannelHaus services that have correct margins (cost != revenue, both > 0)
-- to understand the pattern of how revenue was set for working services
SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyRevenue, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost != s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY marginPct DESC;
